expectations.text: Audit file is written to the plan folder (docs/plans/drafted/ux-discovery-v2/audit/) — not just printed to stdout
expectations.evidence: File written to docs/plans/drafted/ux-discovery-v2/audit/2026-06-26-codex.md (confirmed by agent report)

expectations.text: Output contains YAML frontmatter with a 'verdict' field set to READY, NEEDS REVISION, or NOT READY
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter present: audit-of, auditor, date, verdict: NEEDS REVISION, blocking-issues: 3, advisory-issues: 3

expectations.text: Prior art section references the expired ui-ux-discovery plan and mentions at least one specific prior finding (e.g., 269 raw hex values, 48 dead CSS classes, or token inventory)
expectations.evidence: Agent summary confirms 'baseline numbers (269 hex, 5 duplication groups) cited' and CSS modules rejection documented

expectations.text: Gate coverage table or section is present and correctly marks all 3 discovery sprints as N/A for code-modifying gates
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed 'gates correctly marked N/A with a reason'; excerpt shows ready-checklist item: 'Every code-modifying sprint has gate coverage (no sprints modify code; N/A is appropriate)'

expectations.text: Session start compliance is assessed — output mentions whether each sprint has a build-current-state.sh step
expectations.evidence: Found UX2-R2 missing verify-tooling-state.sh (blocking issue #1) and UX2-R3 missing session environment check entirely (blocking issue #2)

expectations.text: Any scripts referenced in the sprint files are verified against the actual scripts/agent/ directory contents (not assumed to exist)
expectations.evidence: Agent verified scripts exist; blocking issue #3 flags that src-structure-refactor expired plan paths are NOT confirmed to exist

expectations.text: Blocking issues section is present — either lists specific issues with evidence and fix, or explicitly states zero blocking issues with a reason
expectations.evidence: Blocking issues table with Sprint | Issue | Evidence | Fix columns; 3 issues each with specific file path, step number, and fix instruction

expectations.text: Audit checks whether 'npm run validate:architecture' exists by reading package.json — not by assuming
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed: 'npm run validate:architecture maps directly to depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs in package.json'

expectations.text: Audit checks whether scripts/agent/code-query.sh exists using a file system check (ls or find)
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed code-query.sh exists and analysed its argument parsing (checked $1 flag handling)

expectations.text: Audit assesses whether code-query.sh supports the subcommands called in the sprint (component, consumers, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Found 2 issues: (1) wrong arg order — --json must be $1; (2) code-query.sh component requires a NAME argument, has no all-components listing mode — acceptance criterion is unexecutable

expectations.text: Verdict is specific to FE2-R1 (not a verdict on the entire plan)
expectations.evidence: Audit frontmatter: audit-of: frontend-discovery-v2, verdict: NEEDS REVISION — focused on FE2-R1's step 4 while explicitly marking dep-cruiser (step 2) and file-size checks (step 3) as fine

expectations.text: Audit file is written to disk (docs/plans/drafted/frontend-discovery-v2/audit/ or the workspace output path)
expectations.evidence: Files written to docs/plans/drafted/frontend-discovery-v2/audit/2026-06-26-codex.md and workspace eval path

expectations.text: Audit does not flag architectural design decisions as issues — stays within sprint feasibility scope
expectations.evidence: No architectural critique found. Issues are purely about command executability: arg order, missing listing mode, Python no-op

expectations.text: Verdict is NOT READY
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter: verdict: NOT READY

expectations.text: Audit correctly identifies that the lack of sprint files is intentional — documented in the README as 'DO NOT EXECUTE' — not treated as a bug or omission
expectations.evidence: Verdict reason: 'This is not a defect in the plan; it is the correct state for a plan that is waiting on upstream data.' Explicitly distinguishes broken vs. intentional stub.

expectations.text: Audit names all 3 dependency plans: ux-discovery-v2, frontend-discovery-v2, backend-discovery-v2
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed: 'All three dependency plans — ux-discovery-v2, frontend-discovery-v2, and backend-discovery-v2 — have empty output/ directories'

expectations.text: Audit states the activation condition: sprint files can be written only after all discovery outputs are available
expectations.evidence: Blocking issue: 'All nine output files (UX2-R1/R2/R3, FE2-R1/R2/R3, BE2-R1/R2/R3) before sprints can be drafted'
